description: International Mathematical Olympiad. Official results by country and year.
Romanian Master of Mathematics — elite international olympiad held annually in Bucharest.
USA Mathematical Olympiad. Top-tier national olympiad for high school students.
USA Junior Mathematical Olympiad. National olympiad for students in grade 10 or below.

February Harvard-MIT Mathematics Tournament. Individual scores from Algebra, Geometry, and Combinatorics rounds. Difficulty: mid-AIME to olympiad. Students may not attend both November and February in the same school year.

November Harvard-MIT Mathematics Tournament. Individual scores from General and Theme rounds. Difficulty: mid-AMC to upper-AIME. Students may not attend both November and February in the same school year.
General round subject test at November HMMT.
Theme round subject test at November HMMT.
Algebra and Number Theory subject test at February HMMT.
Geometry subject test at February HMMT.
Combinatorics subject test at February HMMT.
Princeton University Mathematics Competition, Division A. Annual team and individual contest.
Princeton University Mathematics Competition, Division B. Annual team and individual contest.
Algebra subject test (Division A) at PUMaC.
Algebra subject test (Division B) at PUMaC.
Combinatorics subject test (Division A) at PUMaC.
Geometry subject test (Division A) at PUMaC.
Geometry subject test (Division B) at PUMaC.
Number Theory subject test (Division A) at PUMaC.
Combinatorics subject test (Division B) at PUMaC.
Number Theory subject test (Division B) at PUMaC.
National-level rankings for the MATHCOUNTS competition series.
Carnegie Mellon Informatics and Mathematics Competition. Annual contest at CMU with individual and team rounds.
Algebra and Number Theory subject test at CMIMC.
Combinatorics and Computer Science subject test at CMIMC.
Geometry subject test at CMIMC.
American Regions Mathematics League. Regional team competition with power and individual rounds.
Duke Math Meet. Annual mathematics competition at Duke University with individual and team rounds.
Caltech Math Meet. Annual mathematics competition at Caltech with individual rankings.
Math Prize for Girls. Annual competition at MIT by Advantage Testing Foundation for top female high school mathematicians.
Olympiad competition by Advantage Testing Foundation for top female high school mathematicians, with Gold, Silver, and Bronze medals.
Math Majors of America Tournament for High Schools. Team-based contest at multiple university sites, run by undergraduate math students.
Berkeley Math Tournament. Annual competition at UC Berkeley with individual and team rounds.
Algebra subject test at the Berkeley Math Tournament.
Calculus subject test at the Berkeley Math Tournament.
Discrete mathematics subject test at the Berkeley Math Tournament.
Geometry subject test at the Berkeley Math Tournament.
Bay Area Mathematical Olympiad, middle school division. Annual proof-based contest for students in the Bay Area.
Bay Area Mathematical Olympiad, high school division. Annual proof-based contest for students in the Bay Area.
